name: randhpaulmd@gmail.com
subject: major announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

Last night I won the Republican Liberty Caucus straw poll.

This is the biggest straw poll in the key early state of New Hampshire and a crucial test of who has the organization in place to turn out their supporters.

That makes a three-for-three clean sweep in the biggest and most significant straw polls for the presidential race in 2015.

**[Can I count on you to chip in a contribution of $20.16 to help my campaign build on this momentum](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30941466:s_xmwxmON:m:1:879035888:327EF42075AE35E85A1C3504F3E05D46:r)**?

Fellow Conservative, my victories in the straw polls at the Conservative Political Action Conference, Mackinac Island and last night's Republican Liberty Caucus event prove one thing...

My grassroots-centered campaign can flex organizational muscle.

And this is especially important as two of the first four contests for President are caucuses -- which are won through disciplined grassroots organization.

But you and I both know the liberal media trips over itself to try and dismiss my campaign.

After all, I'm not their handpicked candidate.

My campaign isn't beholden to Wall Street or fat cat lobbyists.

So I need your help to bust through the media blackout and take my message directly to the voters.

Your support will give my campaign the vital resources to continue the momentum and spread my message of liberty to Republican primary voters in key states like Iowa, New Hampshire, South Carolina, and Nevada.

But even grassroots-driven campaigns require money.

There are offices, staff, phone banks, yard signs, materials, campaign travel, and many of the other expenses necessary for a campaign to function.

TV, Internet, and radio ads. Email and direct mail to targeted voters across the country.

It all adds up.

That's why I'm asking for your support to build on my important victory in last night's Republican Liberty Caucus straw poll.

If you're with me in this fight for the long haul to defeat the Washington Machine and take our country back, I need you to chip in a contribution of $20.16.

Every dollar you can afford to donate right now is critical and will help my campaign keep up the momentum.

**[So please let me know you're still with me in this fight by chipping in a contribution today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30941466:s_xmwxmON:m:1:879035888:327EF42075AE35E85A1C3504F3E05D46:r)**.

Thank you in advance for your support.

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30941467:s_xmwxmON:m:1:879035888:327EF42075AE35E85A1C3504F3E05D46:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30941468:s_xmwxmON:m:1:879035888:327EF42075AE35E85A1C3504F3E05D46:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30941469:s_xmwxmON:m:1:879035888:327EF42075AE35E85A1C3504F3E05D46:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30941470:s_xmwxmON:m:1:879035888:327EF42075AE35E85A1C3504F3E05D46:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30941466:s_xmwxmON:m:1:879035888:327EF42075AE35E85A1C3504F3E05D46:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30941466:s_xmwxmON:m:1:879035888:327EF42075AE35E85A1C3504F3E05D46:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30941471:s_xmwxmON:m:1:879035888:327EF42075AE35E85A1C3504F3E05D46:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30941472:s_xmwxmON:m:1:879035888:327EF42075AE35E85A1C3504F3E05D46:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30941473:s_xmwxmON:m:1:879035888:327EF42075AE35E85A1C3504F3E05D46:r)
Paid for by Rand Paul for President

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 16, 2015.
For more information [click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/is_xmwxmON). [Update your preferences](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/os_xmwxmON)

name: Alex Conant, MarcoRubio.com
subject: add this to your morning routine
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
| | | | | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44371744:66BOsCLNj:m:1:1349778030:F5E18CE79C226A3CE1CE4359B4996C2A:r)
---
| | | | Peter -- Every Monday through Friday our team wakes up to the Daily Kickoff, an email highlighting the latest news on MarcoRubio.com, photos from the campaign trail, video clips, and more. You'll get completely caught up on what Marco is doing and saying in under a minute. **[Click here to sign up now and receive the Daily Kickoff tomorrow morning at 7 a.m.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44371743:66BOsCLNj:m:1:1349778030:F5E18CE79C226A3CE1CE4359B4996C2A:r)** Here's a quick preview of what you'll get:
* Watch local TV coverage of Marco's Nevada rally that had an overflowing crowd
* Read about Marco's plan for helping Afghanistan combat the rise of jihadists
* Suggested tweets and Facebook posts about the news of the day

It's a must-read for all of us here on the team and now it's available to everyone who wants the inside scoop on Marco and the campaign. Alex ConantCommunications DirectorMarco Rubio for President
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44371743:66BOsCLNj:m:1:1349778030:F5E18CE79C226A3CE1CE4359B4996C2A:r)

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: 500,000 against Citizens United
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Friends,

The Koch brothers' group, Americans for Prosperity, has attacked me for being against _Citizens United_. Perhaps they thought that would change my opinion on one of the most disastrous Supreme Court decisions in our history.

You know what? _It hasn 't._ In fact, the attack has only convinced me that we need to do even more to put an end to _Citizens United_ and get groups like those backed by the Kochs OUT of our elections.

There's one sure-fire way to stop it -- a constitutional amendment to overturn _Citizens United_. But it's not an easy undertaking. Constitutional amendments take a lot of work. They also take a lot of allies. **Which brings me to why I 'm emailing you today.**

A few colleagues and I are putting together a petition. We're trying to gather 500,000 citizen co-sponsors for a constitutional amendment to overturn _Citizens United_. [**Will you join us?**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2143/738133e4/3a4ac2e3/7f8116e0/2680693459/VEsH/ "http://sign.actiontaker.org/page/s/co-sponsor-s2015?source=murphy")

[**Be one of the 500,000 citizen co-sponsors. Click here and add your name.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2143/738133e4/3a4ac2e3/7f8116e0/2680693459/VEsE/ "http://sign.actiontaker.org/page/s/co-sponsor-s2015?source=murphy")

Thanks for your help today!

Patrick | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2143/738133e4/3a4ac2e3/7f8116e1/2680693459/VEsF/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2143/738133e4/3a4ac2e3/7f8116e2/2680693459/VEsC/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/unsubscribe").

Contributions or gifts to Friends of Patrick Murphy are not tax deductible.

All content (C) 2015 Friends of Patrick Murphy, All Rights Reserved
[Privacy Policy](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2143/738133e4/3a4ac2e3/7f8116e3/2680693459/VEsD/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/privacy")

name: Mike Mikus
subject: Katie's note
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
---
Friend --

I wanted to make sure you saw this note from Katie about Planned Parenthood.

Just a few hours after sending that email, Tea Party Republicans forced Kevin McCarthy, the frontrunner for the Speaker position, out of the race. This leaves an opening for Tea Party conservatives to take over Congressional leadership.

We know that no matter who the new Speaker is, defunding Planned Parenthood will be a top priority. We also know that Pat Toomey will be right there with them.

**[Add your name and stand with Katie and Planned Parenthood. We must protect women's health from radical right-wing attacks.](http://www.grassrootsforchange.com/defend-pp?utm_source=mcginty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pp?ms=100915)**

Thanks,

Mike Mikus
Campaign Manager

_\---- Original message ----
_From: Katie McGinty
Subject: Stand with Planned Parenthood__

Friend --

Planned Parenthood saves lives. Their work strengthens communities by providing quality, affordable healthcare for millions of women and men. But right now anti-choice legislators are doing everything they can to defund Planned Parenthood -- they even voted yesterday to form a special Congressional committee to investigate the organization.

[**We can 't let Republicans take healthcare away from millions of women and men across the country. Add your name and join our fight to defend Planned Parenthood. **](https://act.myngp.com/el/5257137929918087168/-4169186464317308928?utm_source=mcginty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pp)

| _[](https://act.myngp.com/el/5257137929918087168/-4169186464317308928?utm_source=mcginty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pp)_
---

Make no mistake: This is not an unbiased government investigation. It's a political witch hunt for Republicans to hurt Planned Parenthood's reputation by using misleading evidence to invent tales of illegal activities.

Here in Pennsylvania, Pat Toomey says he's a moderate, but I can't think of anything more extreme than trying to take lifesaving medical treatment away from the women and men who need it. And Toomey did more than just vote to defund Planned Parenthood -- _he cosponsored the bill._

Toomey and his Republican friends in Congress continually prioritize their own political messaging above the health and privacy of women. They care more about getting elected than about doing their job and working for their constituents.

[**Add your name and join our fight to defend Planned Parenthood from unwarranted right-wing attacks.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/5257137929918087168/-4169186464317308928?utm_source=mcginty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pp)

Thank you for your support,

Katie

| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/5257137929918087168/-4097128870279380992?refcode=u20151009e&amount=15)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/5257137929918087168/-4241244058355236864).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

They care more about getting elected than about doing their job and working for their constituents. Thank you for your support, Katie | | | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate

name: James Carville
subject: Us donkeys gotta stick together
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Show Hillary you're with her. | Friend --

The number one thing us Hillary supporters need to do to get ready for the first debate is let her know we're with her.

**Donate $1 to become a Debate Donor and join the group of folks who pledge to stand with Hillary during this important moment in the campaign. No flash cards or policy prep-work required:** | [ | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjM3MjIwOTkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxMTcxNTEwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjM3MjIwOTkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxMTcxNTEwS0&mt=1&rt=0)

Thanks,

Carville

**Did someone forward this email to you?[Add your name here to get more like it!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=26&ms=MjM3MjIwOTkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxMTcxNTEwS0&mt=1&rt=0)** | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=25&ms=MjM3MjIwOTkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxMTcxNTEwS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjM3MjIwOTkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxMTcxNTEwS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjM3MjIwOTkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxMTcxNTEwS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjM3MjIwOTkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxMTcxNTEwS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=22&ms=MjM3MjIwOTkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxMTcxNTEwS0&mt=1&rt=0). Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
